form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 2nd of 17 at Yesiloba All Weather on April 4 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Pala Salih carrying 60kg at $5.25. The run before that won by 1.75 len at Antalya March 26 over 1400m defeating Ogul Cinar with 58kg at $3.55. Could easily blow them away in the dying stages.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run 3rd of 9 at Osmangazi All Weather on March 30 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Cemhan with 58kg at $10.25. The race before that 3rd of 8 at Veliefendi All Weather on March 18 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Cemhan carrying 58kg at $9.50. Sure to be competitive with so few opponents.
